bits.premise: Accusations of racism are deflected by attributing the real racism to elephants, who exclusively trample people who aren't paying attention.
Dying by elephant trampling is darkly absurd because instead of a peaceful deathbed scene, the priest takes predatory advantage of the moment.

lines.text: Sony, somebody told me back there,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'll tell you what's racist is elephants.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You never hear any white people getting killed by an elephant.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: How much have you got to be not paying attention
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to get killed by an elephant?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Anyways, worst part about getting killed by an elephant
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You're like, "Well, I've been killed by an elephant."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it's exactly the opposite of what you thought it would be like when you died.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: surrounded by loved ones, candles, and a priest trying to put his cock in your mouth. And you're
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: like, "Hey man, I'm dying. Over here he goes." And the priest is like, "That's what makes it extra
lines.label: tag

lines.text: dirty." So, I'll sell you later.
lines.label: fluff
